properties.name: pathops.public.base-url
properties.description: Public base URL of the PathOps control plane.

properties.name: pathops.auth.issuer
properties.description: OAuth2 issuer URL used for JWT validation.

properties.name: pathops.auth.client-id
properties.description: OAuth2 client ID for the control plane public client.

properties.name: pathops.events.rabbitmq.exchange
properties.description: RabbitMQ topic exchange name for PathOps events.

properties.name: pathops.events.rabbitmq.projector-queue
properties.description: RabbitMQ queue name for the projector events consumer.

properties.name: pathops.events.outbox.publisher.fixed-delay-ms
properties.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between outbox publisher executions.

properties.name: pathops.events.outbox.publisher.batch-size
properties.description: Number of outbox events processed per publisher execution.
